name: Jack Paar
description: American author, radio and television comedian and talk show host (1918-2004)
abstract: Jack Harold Paar (May 1, 1918 – January 27, 2004) was an American talk show host, writer, radio and television comedian, and film actor. He was the second host of The Tonight Show from 1957 to 1962.

concerts.label: Children's Asthma Research Institute and Hospital 3rd Annual Parade of Stars

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: Then this says, on your resume, arranging partial television, Jack Paar Show. ... Oh, these were different guests that would come on.

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Tate
about_quotes.evidence: Jack Paar brought him back... during the time they played 'Girl from Ipanema.'

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: So was Jack Paar and so was Merv Griffin. They were all nice guys to work with
